name: Aunt Rose Mc Call's Ox Tail Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ox tails well in hot fat.
2. Add water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for at least 3 hours, or until the meat is tender.
3. Remove the meat from the bone and return it to the pot.
4. Add rice and cook for an additional 30 minutes.
5. Skim off as much fat as possible from the surface of the soup.
6. This soup can be made ahead of time and reheated before serving, making it easier to remove any remaining fat.
